summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Speakupp landing page. All features working correctly including hero section with actual photos, navigation, pricing in INR, schedule, testimonials, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Navigation links scroll to correct sections (About, Benefits, Pricing, Schedule, Reviews)
Hero section shows Sandhya's actual photo with working CTA buttons
About section displays corporate event photo with correct stats (7+ years, 800+ events, 500+ lives)
Benefits section shows 4 benefit cards as expected
Video section shows event photo with clickable play button overlay
Pricing section displays 3 plans with correct INR pricing (₹999, ₹1,999, ₹3,999)
Standard plan correctly marked as 'Most Popular'
Schedule section shows Mon, Wed, Sat at 7:00 PM IST
Testimonials section displays 3 client reviews with star ratings
CTA section has working 'Book Your Spot' button
Footer shows Speakupp branding and hello@speakupp.com email
All social media links properly configured with target='_blank'
Mobile responsive design works perfectly across all sections
All buttons are clickable with proper hover effects
All images load correctly including Sandhya's actual photos
Email link properly configured with mailto protocol
